title: Verify BUG-0002 acceptance criteria
description: Check all four BUG-0002 acceptance criteria after production redeploy and UI hardening: page load produces no error, /api/reviews returns JSON, structured errors are surfaced in the UI, and the Pending Reviews panel renders correctly.
notes: Verification can run against the production admin UI (authenticated) or a locally launched instance. Record evidence for each AC in sprints/S0009/qa-evidence/.
verification_steps: Reload authenticated admin UI; confirm no GET /api/reviews 404 and no SyntaxError in console (AC-1).
Probe GET /api/reviews and confirm HTTP 200 JSON {success:true,reviews:[...]} or structured {success:false,error:...} (AC-2).
If a structured {success:false,error:...} response is returned, confirm loadPendingReviews surfaces it via showToast without a JSON parse error (AC-3).

With real review data present, confirm the Pending Reviews panel renders each item with transaction summary, history category + confidence, AI category + confidence, recommended choice, and Accept/Reject actions (AC-4).
